documentation:
# entity-management

Library for handling NEXUS entity dataclass definitions.

# Documentation

- [latest release](https://entity-management.readthedocs.io/en/stable/)
- [latest snapshot](https://entity-management.readthedocs.io/en/latest/)

# Installation

entity-management can be pip installed with the following command:

```bash
$ pip install entity-management
```

# Tests

```bash
pip install tox
tox
```

# Logging

To log responses from Nexus in a pretty format, you may want to ensure that the package [devtools](https://github.com/samuelcolvin/python-devtools) is installed, and set the environment variables:

```bash
PY_DEVTOOLS_ENABLE=1
PY_DEVTOOLS_HIGHLIGHT=1
```

# Acknowledgements

The development of this software was supported by funding to the Blue Brain Project, a research center of the École polytechnique fédérale de Lausanne (EPFL), from the Swiss government’s ETH Board of the Swiss Federal Institutes of Technology.

For license and authors, see LICENSE.txt and AUTHORS.txt respectively.

Copyright (c) 2022-2024 Blue Brain Project/EPFL

modules.name: entity_management.electrophysiology
documentation:
Experimental morphologies entities

```
.. inheritance-diagram:: entity_management.electrophysiology
   :top-classes: entity_management.electrophysiology._Entity,
    entity_management.electrophysiology.StimulusType, entity_management.core.Activity
   :parts: 1
```
SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0

classes.name: entity_management.electrophysiology.StimulusType
documentation:
Stimulus type wrapper.

Args:
    stimulusType(OntologyTerm): Stimulus type ontology term.

classes.name: entity_management.electrophysiology.StimulusExperiment
documentation:
Stimulus experiment.

Args:
    stimulus(OntologyTerm): doc.
    used(PatchedCell): doc.

classes.name: entity_management.electrophysiology.TraceGeneration
documentation:
Trace generation.

Args:
    activity (StimulusExperiment): Points at stimulus experiment activity that generated trace.
    sweep (int): Sweep number of the trace.
    providerExperimentId (str): Points at stimulus experiment activity that generated trace.
    providerExperimentName (str): Laboratory name of the experiment.
    waveNumberRange (str): Python range expression into which sweep number should fall.
    targetHoldingPotential (QuantitativeValue): Target holding potential.

classes.name: entity_management.electrophysiology.Trace
documentation:
Trace.

Args:
    projectName(str): Name of the project that the trace was recorded for.
    channel(int): Channel number of trace.
    retrievalDate(datetime): Retrieval date of binary.
    qualifiedGeneration(TraceGeneration): Qualified trace generation.
    wasGeneratedBy(StimulusExperiment): Stimulus experiment that generated trace.

modules.name: entity_management.debug
documentation: Debug utilities.

functions.name: entity_management.debug._env_true
documentation:
Return True, False, or None depending on the value of the given env variable name.

Return:

- True if the env variable is set to "1" or "true" (case-insensitive)
- None if it's set to an empty string, or not set
- False if it's set to something else

functions.name: entity_management.debug._get_pformat
documentation: Return the function to be used for formatting.

classes.name: entity_management.debug.PP
documentation:
Lazy pretty printer with pformat from devtools, or fallback to str.

To enable devtools pretty formatting:

- ensure that devtools is installed
- set PY_DEVTOOLS_ENABLE=1
- set PY_DEVTOOLS_HIGHLIGHT=1

functions.name: entity_management.context.expand
documentation: Expand term using the context if it exists or return the term otherwise.

functions.name: entity_management.context.get_resolved_context
documentation:
Get resolved context.

Args:
    obj: Either a resource id or the jsonld['@context'] contents.


Returns:
    Resolved Context instance.

modules.name: entity_management.util
documentation: Utilities
SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0

functions.name: entity_management.util._list_of
documentation:
A validator that raises a {exc}`TypeError` if the initializer is called
with a list of wrong types for this particular attribute (checks are performed
using {func}`isinstance` therefore it's also valid to pass a tuple of types).

```
param type

The type to check for.

type type

type or tuple of types

raises TypeError

With a human readable error message, the attribute
(of type ), the expected type, and the value it
got.
```

functions.name: entity_management.util._get_union_params
documentation: Return Union elements for all python

functions.name: entity_management.util._get_list_params
documentation: Return List elements for all python

functions.name: entity_management.util._clean_up_dict
documentation: Produce new dictionary without json-ld attrs which start with @

functions.name: entity_management.util.quote
documentation: Helper function for urllib.parse.quote with safe="".

functions.name: entity_management.util.split_url_params
documentation: Split url from revision query.

functions.name: entity_management.util.unquote_uri_path
documentation:
Convert a file uri to a system path.

Example:
    file:///%5BPH%5Dlayer_6.nrrd -> /[PH]layer_6.nrrd

functions.name: entity_management.util.get_entity
documentation:
Instantiate an entity from a resource id.

Args:
    resource_id: The string id of the KG resource.
    cls: entity-management class to instantiate.
    cross_bucket: Whether to use the resolvers to get the resource. Default is True.
    base: Optional nexus base endpoint. Default is retrieved from global state.
    org: Optional nexus organization. Default is retrieved from global state.
    proj: Optional nexus project. Default is retrieved from global state.
    token: Optional OAuth token. Default is retrieved from global state.

Returns:
    Instantiated entity from given id.

Raises:
    ResourceNotFoundError if entity is not found.
    EntityNotInstantiatedError if entity fails to be instantiated.

classes.name: entity_management.util._ListOfValidator

methods.name: entity_management.util._ListOfValidator.__call__
documentation: We use a callable class to be able to change the `__repr__`.
Validate list of type
copied from attrs, their standard way to make validators

classes.name: entity_management.util._NotInstatiatedValidator
documentation: A validator that allows NotInstantiated values.

classes.name: entity_management.util.NotInstantiated
documentation:
A class for not instantiated attributes
Trying to access an attribute with this value will trigger
the instantiation. A Nexus query will be performed and the attribute
will be filled with the real value

classes.name: entity_management.util.AttrOf
documentation:
Create an object with self.fn(Callable) that will be used to create an attr.ib by invoking
Callable.

:::{deprecated} 1.2.9 Use regular attrs. This used to do some magic for previous versions of attrs.
:::

modules.name: entity_management.state
documentation:
State of the interaction with nexus. For example current project to use.

Nexus organization, project and access token are initialized from the corresponding
environment variables. They can be updated using setter functions from this module.
SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0

functions.name: entity_management.state.get_token
documentation: Get access token.

functions.name: entity_management.state.get_token_info
documentation: Decode token.

functions.name: entity_management.state.get_offline_token
documentation: Get offline token.

functions.name: entity_management.state.has_offline_token
documentation: Checks if offline token is available.

functions.name: entity_management.state.refresh_token
documentation: Get new access token from the offline token.

functions.name: entity_management.state.set_token
documentation: Sets the token for interaction with Nexus API.

functions.name: entity_management.state.get_org
documentation:
Get current organization.

Args:

: org (str): optional Organization.

Returns:

: `org` argument. If it was not provided then returns the value of global `Organization`
  variable which is initialized from NEXUS_ORG environment variable.

functions.name: entity_management.state.set_org
documentation: Set global `Organization` variable.

functions.name: entity_management.state.get_proj
documentation:
Get current project.

Args:

: proj (str): optional Project.

Returns:

: `proj` argument. If it was not provided then returns the value of global `Project`
  variable which is initialized from NEXUS_PROJ environment variable.

functions.name: entity_management.state.set_proj
documentation: Set global `Project` variable.

functions.name: entity_management.state.set_base
documentation: Set global `Base` url variable.

functions.name: entity_management.state.get_base
documentation: Get global `BASE` url variable.

functions.name: entity_management.state.get_base_resources
documentation:
Get url to nexus environment base for the resources.

Args:

: base (str): optional `Base` url of nexus instance to be used.

Returns:

: Nexus resources endpoint url is either based on `base` function argument provided
  or based on the global `BASE` variable value which is initialized from NEXUS_BASE
  environment variable.

functions.name: entity_management.state.get_base_views
documentation:
Get url to nexus environment base for the views.

Args:

: base (str): optional `Base` url of nexus instance to be used.

Returns:

: Nexus views endpoint url is either based on `base` function argument provided
  or based on the global `BASE` variable value which is initialized from NEXUS_BASE
  environment variable.

functions.name: entity_management.state.get_base_url
documentation: Get base url.

functions.name: entity_management.state.get_sparql_url
documentation: Get base sparql url.

functions.name: entity_management.state.get_es_url
documentation: Get base elasticsearch url.

functions.name: entity_management.state.get_base_files
documentation:
Get url to nexus environment base for the files.

Args:

: base (str): optional `Base` url of nexus instance to be used.

Returns:

: Nexus files endpoint url either based on `base` argument provided or based on the
  global `Base` variable value which is initialized from NEXUS_BASE environment variable.

functions.name: entity_management.state.get_base_resolvers
documentation:
Get url to nexus environment base for the resolvers.

Args:

: base (str): optional `Base` url of nexus instance to be used.

Returns:

: Nexus resolvers endpoint url either based on `base` argument provided or based on the
  global `Base` variable value which is initialized from NEXUS_BASE environment variable.

documentation: Construct user id.

variables.name: entity_management.state.TOKEN
documentation: can be access token or offline if running in bbp-workflow

modules.name: entity_management.nexus
documentation: New nexus access layer
SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0

functions.name: entity_management.nexus.register_type
documentation:
Store type corresponding type hint.

Args:
    hint (str): Type hint. In general can be any string such as id of the schema which
        constraines the type or @type name in the case of unconstrained type.
    cls (type): Entity python class which maps to this hint.

functions.name: entity_management.nexus._find_type
documentation: Get type from the json-ld @types. It can be a list of types or a single string.

functions.name: entity_management.nexus._get_headers
documentation: Get headers with additional authorization header if token is not None

functions.name: entity_management.nexus._print_violation_summary
documentation: Add colors, remove hashes and other superfluous things from error message

functions.name: entity_management.nexus._print_nexus_error
documentation: Helper function to log nexus error response.

functions.name: entity_management.nexus._to_json
documentation: Convert response to json and log if necessary.

functions.name: entity_management.nexus._nexus_wrapper
documentation: Pretty print nexus error responses, inject token if set in env

functions.name: entity_management.nexus.get_type_from_name
documentation: Get type class for type name or return None.

functions.name: entity_management.nexus.get_type_from_id
documentation: Get type which corresponds to the id_url

functions.name: entity_management.nexus.create
documentation:
Create entity, return json response

Args:
    base_url (str): Base url of the entity which will be saved.
    payload (dict): Json-ld serialization of the entity.
    token (str): Optional OAuth token.

Returns:
    Json response.

functions.name: entity_management.nexus.update
documentation:
Update entity, return json response

Args:
    id_url (str): Url of the entity which will be updated.
    rev (int): Revision number.
    payload (dict): Json-ld serialization of the entity.
    token (str): Optional OAuth token.

Returns:
    Json response.

functions.name: entity_management.nexus.deprecate
documentation: Mark entity as deprecated, return json response

functions.name: entity_management.nexus.load_by_url
documentation:
Load json-ld from url

Args:

: url (str): Url of the entity which will be loaded.
  params (dict): Url query params.
  stream (bool): If True then `response.content` stream is returned.
  token (str): Optional OAuth token.

Returns:

: if stream is true then response stream content is returned otherwise
  json response.

functions.name: entity_management.nexus.load_by_id
documentation:
Load json-ld from id.

Args:

: resource_id (str) : Id of the entity which will be loaded.
  cross_bucket (bool): Wether to search resource in multiple buckets or not.
  params (dict): Url query params.
  stream (bool): If True then `response.content` stream is returned.
  base (str): The nexus base endpoint.
  org (str): The nexus organization.
  proj (str): The nexus project.
  token (str): Optional OAuth token.

Returns:

: if stream is true then response stream content is returned otherwise
  json response.

functions.name: entity_management.nexus.get_current_agent
documentation: Get user info

functions.name: entity_management.nexus._get_file_metadata
documentation: Helper function

functions.name: entity_management.nexus.get_file_rev
documentation:
Get file rev.

Args:
    resource_id (str): Nexus ID of the file.
    tag (str): Provide tag to fetch specific file.
    token (str): Optional OAuth token.

Returns:
    File revision.

functions.name: entity_management.nexus.get_file_location
documentation:
Get file location.

Args:
    resource_id (str): Nexus ID of the file.
    tag (str): Provide tag to fetch specific file.
    token (str): Optional OAuth token.

Returns:
    File revision.

functions.name: entity_management.nexus.get_unquoted_uri_path
documentation:
Get unquoted uri location path.

Args:
    url (str): Nexus URL of the file.
    tag (str): Provide tag to fetch specific file.
    token (str): Optional OAuth token.

functions.name: entity_management.nexus.get_file_name
documentation:
Get file rev.

Args:
    resource_id (str): Nexus ID of the file.
    tag (str): Provide tag to fetch specific file.
    token (str): Optional OAuth token.

Returns:
    File name.

functions.name: entity_management.nexus.upload_file
documentation:
Upload file.

Args:
    name (str): File name.
    data (file): File like data stream.
    content_type (str): Content type of the data stream.
    resource_id (str): Optional nexus id of the file.
    storage_id (str): Optional identifier of the storage backend where the file will be stored.
        If not provided, the project's default storage is used.
    rev (int): If you are reuploading file this needs to match current revision of the file.
    base (str): Nexus instance base url.
    org (str): Nexus organization.
    proj (str): Nexus project.
    token (str): OAuth token.

Returns:
    Identifier of the uploaded file.

functions.name: entity_management.nexus.link_file
documentation:
Link file.

Args:
    name (str): File name.
    file_path (str): File path.
    content_type (str): Content type of the data stream.
    resource_id (str): Optional nexus id of the file.
    storage_id (str): Optional identifier of the storage backend where the file will be stored.
        If not provided, the project's default storage is used.
    base (str): Nexus instance base url.
    org (str): Nexus organization.
    proj (str): Nexus project.
    token (str): OAuth token.

Returns:
    Identifier of the uploaded file.

functions.name: entity_management.nexus.download_file
documentation:
Download file.

Args:
    url (str): Nexus url of the file.
    path (str): Path where to save the file.
    file_name (str): Provide file name to use instead of original name.
    tag (str): Provide tag to fetch specific file.
    rev (int): Provide revision number to fetch specific file.
    token (str): Optional OAuth token.

Returns:
    str: Path to the downloaded file.

functions.name: entity_management.nexus.file_as_dict
documentation:
Stream file.

Args:
    url (str): Nexus url of the file.
    tag (str): Provide tag to fetch specific file.
    rev (int): Provide revision number to fetch specific file.
    token (str): Optional OAuth token.

Returns:
    Raw response.

functions.name: entity_management.nexus.sparql_query
documentation:
Execute SPARQL query.

Args:
    query (str): SPARQL query.
    base (str): Nexus instance base url.
    org (str): Nexus organization.
    proj (str): Nexus project.
    token (str): Optional OAuth token.

Returns:
    Json response.

functions.name: entity_management.nexus.es_query
documentation:
Execute Elasticsearch query.

Args:
    query (dict): Elasticsearch dictionary query to serialize to json.
    base (str): Nexus instance base url.
    org (str): Nexus organization.
    proj (str): Nexus project.
    token (str): Optional OAuth token.

Returns:
    Json response.

functions.name: entity_management.cli.base.get
documentation:
Fetch a ModelBuildingConfig by ID or URL and print a subset of its contents.

Requires NEXUS_TOKEN, NEXUS_ORG and NEXUS_PROJ to be set in the environment.

NOTE: Does not support revisions. I.e., only retrieves the current revision of the entity.

classes.name: entity_management.circuit.building.functional.EstimateSynsCon

class_variables.name: entity_management.circuit.building.functional.EstimateSynsCon.formula
documentation: : Synapse number prediction formula.

Estimate the functional mean number of synapses per connection from the structural number     of appositions per connection. For the prediction, an algebraic expression using ‘n’     (mean number of appositions) should be specified.

classes.name: entity_management.circuit.building.functional.ExperimentalSynsCon
documentation: Use the biological mean number of synapses per connection for a number of pathways where     experimental data is available.

classes.name: entity_management.circuit.building.functional.EstimateBoutonReduction
documentation: Estimate an overall reduction factor based on an estimated mean bouton density over all     mtypes.

classes.name: entity_management.circuit.building.functional.EstimateIndividualBoutonReduction
documentation: Estimate a reduction factor for each individual mtype, where experimental data is available.

modules.name: entity_management.core
documentation:
Provenance entities

```
.. inheritance-diagram:: entity_management.core
   :top-classes: entity_management.base.BlankNode,
    entity_management.base.Identifiable
   :parts: 1
```
SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0

classes.name: entity_management.core.DataDownload

methods.name: entity_management.core.DataDownload.from_file
documentation:
Create DataDownload object form file_like.

Args:
    file_like (Union[str, Path, BytesIO]): Path to the file or BytesIO buffer with data.
    name (str): Optional name for the DataDownload name property. If not provided
        file name with extension from the `file_like` will be used.
    resource_id (str): Optional file resource identifier. If not provided will be
        generated by Nexus.
    storage_id (str): Optional identifier of the storage backend where the file will
        be stored. If not provided, the project's default storage is used.
    content_type (str): File content type for example: `text/plain`. Default value:
        `application/octet-stream`.
    use_auth (str): Optional OAuth token.

methods.name: entity_management.core.DataDownload.link_file
documentation:
Move file to nexus managed folder in gpfs project and return created resource identifier.

Args:
    file_path (str): Path to the file.
    name (str): Optional name for the DataDownload name property. If not provided
        file name with extension from the `file_path` will be used.
    resource_id (str): Optional file resource identifier. If not provided will be
        generated by Nexus.
    storage_id (str): Optional identifier of the storage backend where the file will
        be stored. If not provided, the project's default storage is used.
    content_type (str): File content type for example: `text/plain`.
    use_auth (str): Optional OAuth token.

methods.name: entity_management.core.DataDownload.from_json_str
documentation:
Create DataDownload object representing json form serialized dict in string.

Args:
    json_str (str): Dict serialized as json string.
    resource_id (str): Optional file resource identifier. If not provided will be
        generated by Nexus.
    name (str): Optional name for the DataDownload name property. If not provided
        a uuid will be generated.
    use_auth (str): Optional OAuth token.

methods.name: entity_management.core.DataDownload.download
documentation:
Download `contentUrl`.

Args:

: path (str): Optional path where to save the file. If not provided current folder will

  : be used.

  file_name (str): Optional file name. If not provided, file name will be taken from

  : the name stored in Nexus.

  use_auth (str): Optional OAuth token.

methods.name: entity_management.core.DataDownload.get_location
documentation:
Get file location when applicable.

For files located on the gpfs storage backend, this will give direct file URI.

Args:
    use_auth (str): Optional OAuth token.

methods.name: entity_management.core.DataDownload.get_location_path
documentation:
Get file path when applicable.

For files located on the gpfs storage backend, this will give direct filesystem path.

Args:
    use_auth (str): Optional OAuth token.

methods.name: entity_management.core.DataDownload.get_url_as_path
documentation: Get url path when applicable.

methods.name: entity_management.core.DataDownload.as_dict
documentation:
Get `contentUrl` as dict.

Args:

: use_auth (str): Optional OAuth token.

methods.name: entity_management.core.DataDownload.get_id
documentation: Retrieve _id property.

External resource representations, this can be a file or a folder on gpfs.

Args:
    name (str): The distribution name.
    license (Identifiable): A Link towards the distribution license.
    contentUrl (str): When followed this link leads to the actual data.
    url (str): When followed this link leads to a resource providing further description on
        how to download the attached data.
    contentSize (int): If known in advance size of the resource.
    digest (int): Hash/Checksum of the resource.
    encodingFormat (str): Type of the resource accessible by the contentUrl.

either `downloadURL` for files or `accessURL` for folders must be provided

classes.name: entity_management.core.Activity

methods.name: entity_management.core.Activity.publish
documentation:
Create or update activity resource in nexus.

Args:
    resource_id (str): Resource identifier.
    include_rev (bool): Whether to include _rev in the linked entities or not.
    activity (Activity): Optional activity which provided information to the current
        activity.

Returns:
    New instance of the same class with revision updated.

Base class for provenance activity.

Args:
    name (str): Activity name.
    status (str): Status can be `None`, `Pending`, `Running`, `Done` or `Failed`.
    used (Identifiable): Entity used by this activity.
    generated (Identifiable): Entity generated by this activity.
    startedAtTime (datetime): Activity start time.
    endedAtTime (datetime): Activity end time.
    wasStartedBy (Identifiable): Entity/Agent which started/triggered the activity.
        https://www.w3.org/TR/prov-o/#wasStartedBy
    wasInformedBy (Identifiable): Activity which provided input for the current activity.
        https://www.w3.org/TR/prov-o/#wasInformedBy
    wasInfluencedBy (Identifiable): Entity/Agent/Activity which influenced the activity.
        https://www.w3.org/TR/prov-o/#wasInfluencedBy
    wasAssociatedWith (Identifiable): Entity/Agent/Activity that had some (unspecified)
        responsibility for the occurrence of this activity.
        https://www.w3.org/TR/prov-o/#wasAssociatedWith

classes.name: entity_management.core.WorkflowExecution
documentation:
Represents activity of a workflow execution.

Args:
    name (str): The user friendly workflow execution entry point. By convention will contain
        full name of a luigi task which was executed.
    module (str): Python module which was used to launch the luigi task from.
    task (str): Luigi task which was launched for execution.
    version (str): Version of the workflow engine used to execute the workflow.
    parameters (str): Concatenated list of parameters provided on the command line
        when the workflow was launched.
    configFileName (str): Name of the config file if one was explicitly provided.
    output (str): Any string that workflow tasks want to deliver as output to the external
        agents.
    distribution (DataDownload): Zip file of the additional python modules and the configuration
        file used to launch the workflow.

classes.name: entity_management.core.Entity

methods.name: entity_management.core.Entity.was_generated_by
documentation:
List all resources which were generated by specified resource.

Args:
    generated_by: Resource activity that generated entities.

Returns:
    Iterator through the generated resources.

methods.name: entity_management.core.Entity.publish
documentation:
Create or update resource in nexus. Makes a remote call to nexus instance to persist
resource attributes. If `use_auth` token is provided user agent will be extracted
from it and corresponding activity with `createdBy` field will be created.

Args:

: resource_id (str): Resource identifier.
  activity (Activity): Optionally provide activity which generated this resource.

  > Otherwise, when running in the context of a bbp-workflow
  > (NEXUS_WORKFLOW env variable is provided), `activity` default value will be
  > workflow execution activity.

  was_attributed_to (Person): Provide person argument in order to add the Person to the

  : set of attribution parameter `self.wasAttributedTo`.

  use_auth (str): OAuth token in case access is restricted.

  : Token should be in the format for the authorization header: Bearer VALUE.

  include_rev (bool): Whether to include \_rev in the linked entities or not.

Returns:

: New instance of the same class with revision updated.
Enables provenance metadata when publishing/deprecating entities.

Model runtime parameters.

methods.name: entity_management.atlas.AtlasBrainRegion._ontology_location
documentation: Return org and proj for ontologies.

methods.name: entity_management.atlas.AtlasBrainRegion.from_id
documentation:
Load entity from resource id.

Args:

: resource_id (str): id of the entity to load.
  on_no_result (Callable): A function to be called when no result found. It will receive

  > `resource_id` as a first argument.

  cross_bucket (bool):

  : Use the resolvers instead of the resources endpoint. Default False.

  resolve_context (bool):

  : Resolve ontological term curies using the resource's context. Default False.

  kwargs: Keyword arguments which will be forwarded to `on_no_result` function.
  use_auth (str): OAuth token in case access is restricted.

  > Token should be in the format for the authorization header: Bearer VALUE.

methods.name: entity_management.atlas.AtlasBrainRegion.from_url
documentation:
Load entity from url.

Args:

: url (str): Full url to the entity in nexus. `_self` content is a valid full URL.
  resolve_context (bool):

  > Resolve ontological term curies using the resource's context. Default False.

  use_auth (str): OAuth token in case access is restricted.

  : token should be in the format for the authorization header: Bearer VALUE.
Atlas Brain Region as defined by the brain model ontology.

classes.name: entity_management.simulation.MorphologyRelease
documentation:
Morphology release can be located at the external location or constituted from individual
{class}`Morphology` entities.

:::{deprecated} 1.0.19 Use :class:`ReconstructedCellCollection` instead.
:::

Args:
: distribution (DataDownload): Data download url should point to the `v1` folder with

  : morphologies in H5v1 format.

  morphologyIndex (ModelReleaseIndex): Morphology index is a compact representation of the

  : morphology properties (MType, region ids) for the performance purposes. This attribute
    should provide a path to locate this file(such as neurondb.dat).

classes.name: entity_management.simulation.ReconstructedCellCollection
documentation:
Reconstructed cell collection produced by the morphology release.

Args:
: distribution (DataDownload): Data download url should point to the `v1` folder with

  : morphologies in H5v1 format.

  morphologyIndex (ModelReleaseIndex): Morphology index is a compact representation of the

  : morphology properties (MType, region ids) for the performance purposes. This attribute
    should provide a path to locate this file(such as neurondb.dat).

        distribution should provide the path to it.

    isPartOf (MorphologyRelease): Release this morphology is part of.
    view2d (Identifiable): Morphology view in 2D.
    view3d (Identifiable): Morphology view in 3D.

@attributes({
'used': AttrOf(SimulationCampaignConfiguration, default=None),
'generated': AttrOf(SimulationCampaignReportCollection, default=None),
class SimulationCampaign(Activity):
'''Simulation campaign activity.
Groups multiple simulations when same circuit is tested under different conditions.
Args:

with captured_output() as (out, err):

methods.name: entity_management.base.Identifiable._lazy_init
documentation: Instantiate an object and put all its attributes to NotInstantiated.

methods.name: entity_management.base.Identifiable.get_constrained_url
documentation: Get schema constrained url.

methods.name: entity_management.base.Identifiable.from_id
documentation:
Load entity from resource id.

Args:

: resource_id (str): id of the entity to load.
  on_no_result (Callable): A function to be called when no result found. It will receive

  > `resource_id` as a first argument.

  cross_bucket (bool):

  : Use the resolvers instead of the resources endpoint. Default False.

  resolve_context (bool):

  : Resolve ontological term curies using the resource's context. Default False.

  kwargs: Keyword arguments which will be forwarded to `on_no_result` function.
  use_auth (str): OAuth token in case access is restricted.

  > Token should be in the format for the authorization header: Bearer VALUE.

methods.name: entity_management.base.Identifiable.from_url
documentation:
Load entity from url.

Args:

: url (str): Full url to the entity in nexus. `_self` content is a valid full URL.
  resolve_context (bool):

  > Resolve ontological term curies using the resource's context. Default False.

  use_auth (str): OAuth token in case access is restricted.

  : Token should be in the format for the authorization header: Bearer VALUE.

methods.name: entity_management.base.Identifiable.list_by_schema

List all instances belonging to the schema this type defines.

Returns:
    New instance of the same class with changes applied.

Get json-ld representation of the Entity
Return json with added json-ld properties such as @context and @type

methods.name: entity_management.base.Identifiable.publish
documentation:
Create or update entity in nexus. Makes a remote call to nexus instance to persist
entity attributes.

Args:
    resource_id (str): Resource identifier. If not provided nexus will generate one.
    use_auth (str): OAuth token in case access is restricted.
        Token should be in the format for the authorization header: Bearer VALUE.
    include_rev (bool): Whether to include _rev in the linked entities or not.
Returns:
    New instance of the same class with revision updated.

methods.name: entity_management.base.Identifiable._instantiate
documentation: Fetch nexus object with id=self._id if it was not initialized before.

methods.name: entity_management.base.Identifiable.deprecate
documentation:
Mark entity as deprecated.
Deprecated entities are not possible to retrieve by name.

Args:
    use_auth (str): OAuth token in case access is restricted.
        Token should be in the format for the authorization header: Bearer VALUE.

methods.name: entity_management.base.Identifiable.evolve
documentation:
Create new instance of the frozen(immutable) object with *changes* applied.

methods.name: entity_management.base.Identifiable.clone
documentation:
Create new instance of the frozen(immutable) object with *changes* applied.

Note: A clone is stripped of its id if present.

Args:
    changes: Keyword changes in the new copy, should be a subset of class
        constructor(__init__) keyword arguments.
Returns:
    New instance of the same class with changes applied.

Represents collapsed/lazy loaded entity having type and id.
Access to any attributes will load the actual entity from nexus and forward property
requests to that entity.

classes.name: entity_management.base.QuantitativeValue
documentation:
External resource representations,
this can be a file or a folder on gpfs

Args:
    value (str): Value.
    unitText (str): Unit text.
    unitCode (str): The unit of measurement given using the UN/CEFACT Common Code (3 characters)
        or a URL. Other codes than the UN/CEFACT Common Code may be used with a prefix followed
        by a colon.
